description_long: This object is a ground-mounted solar panel array, featuring a rectangular grid of blue photovoltaic cells encased in a metallic frame. The panel is supported by a robust structure composed of several black metal posts and crossbars, which elevate and tilt the array at an angle optimal for sunlight exposure. The surface of the panel is divided into a 3x4 grid, with each cell clearly delineated by white grid lines. The rear view reveals the supporting framework and mounting hardware, but no visible electrical cabling or inverter components. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks, rooftops, or open lots. The design is functional and modern, emphasizing efficient solar energy capture and structural stability.
description: A ground-mounted solar panel array with a blue 3x4 grid of photovoltaic cells, supported by a sturdy black metal frame and posts. The structure is angled for optimal sunlight exposure and designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tilted blue solar panel surface and the supporting black metal posts.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black metal framework and mounting structure beneath the panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the angled panel and support posts.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full blue 3x4 grid of photovoltaic cells within a white frame.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 30 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with steel posts and crossbars
